error.noAddressOrToken: No ship address nor treasure map (token) found, matey!

page.title: Blunder!
page.description: A blunder’s struck while loadin' this plundered page. Scour the crew's logs fer more details in the console.

error.connectionFailed: Link with the SoulFire ship’s hub failed, arrr.

page.title: Missin’ at sea!
page.description: Can’t chart a page at this heading, matey.

about.title: About SoulFire
about.description: Ye be runnin' version {{version}} o' the SoulFire crew client.

fields.serverBranch: Server Branch o' the seven seas

support.title: Be Supportin' SoulFire, matey!
support.description: SoulFire be a free 'n open-source treasure, forged with love by the crew.
support.body: If SoulFire's been worth its weight in gold to ye, consider throwin' a coin to the project. Yer booty helps keep the ship sailin', pays fer more grog and code, an' keeps SoulFire free fer all hands.

createInstance.title: Raise a new hull
createInstance.description: Every vessel needs a jolly name, so ye can tell 'em apart. Call it whatever you please, like "Me Minecraft Matey".

friendlyName.label: Jolly moniker
friendlyName.description: The moniker ye wish to name this vessel.
friendlyName.min: Yarr, th' jolly moniker needs at least 3 markings (characters).
friendlyName.max: Moniker can’t be longer than 32 marks, matey.
friendlyName.regex: Jolly moniker must use only letters, numerics, and blank air between!

createToast.success: Hull lifted from the briny deep!
createToast.error: Blasted barnacles! Couldn’t raise the hull!

main.firstClipboardItem: Ye had a pile o' loot in yer clipboard, usin' the first booty only.

url.description: Loadin' from the bottle at sea makes the SoulFire crew send a parrot (GET) to the other ship and use their reply as the booty.

url.empty: Chuck in a prop' url, matey!

url.submit: Heave up treasure from that bottle

commandInput.placeholder: Enter yer decree! (Type 'help' to spy the legend)
commandInput.emptySuggestions: Type to beg for ideas or whack Tab, matey.
commandInput.noSuggestions: No pirate ideas showed up, arrr.

resumeToast.error: Arrr! Forgotten spell—session stuck in limbo!

stopToast.error: Session be too rowdy to scuttle!

accountWarning.noAccountsDescription: Import some pirates 'fore ye hoist a session, mate! {{required}} bots be wanted.
accountWarning.notEnoughDescription: Ye demanded {{required}} bots, but only {{available}} pirates are aboard.
accountWarning.hint: Ye can round up landlubbers offline or smuggle ‘em in from the Account Ship.

dataTable.goFirst: Set course for the first page
dataTable.goLast: Set sail for the last page
dataTable.modifyFilters: Tweak yer sorts fer cleaner pickin'.
dataTable.addFilters: Add some sorts fer tidy lootin'.
dataTable.noFieldsFound: Not a single rigging can be found at sea.
dataTable.typeToFilter: Start typin' to single out sorts...
dataTable.noSortingApplied: No mixin’ up the loot yet, matey
dataTable.modifySorting: Muck about with the loot to get things shipshape.

operators.isBetween: Be twixt two dead men’s chests
operators.notInArray: Holding nary one o' these trinkets!

invalidNumberToast.title: Arrr! That be a bogus number!
invalidNumberToast.description: Yarrr! Value should be between {{min}} and {{max}}, no more and no less!

terminal.noLogs: 🧙 Arrr, there be no logs for th’ captain’s eyes; try runnin’ a command, ye landlubber!
terminal.demo-1: Welcome t' sailin' in demo waters! 🧪
terminal.demo-2: This be a read-only hull in SoulFire.
terminal.demo-3: Give all th' menus and tools a look before pipin' SoulFire into yer own fleet :D
terminal.demo-4: Join our crew in Discord if ye wish to parley: https://soulfiremc.com/discord

window.maximizeLabel: Make the porthole as big as the horizon
window.restoreLabel: Put the porthole back t' normal

broadcastToast.error: Couldn’t fire off the message, mate!

deleteToast.error: Storm ahead! Could not scuttle hull.

loadProfileToast.error: Grog-soaked code! Couldn't fetch the profile.

logOutToast.error: No escaping the plank! Log out failed!

webdav.title: WebDAV Gangway
webdav.description: SoulFire lets ye plunder yer fleet, scripts, and more through WebDAV shenanigans.
webdav.securityWarning: Keep this here WebDAV Treasure Map secret, matey! Don’t be parlayin’ it! It be yer ticket for plunderin’ files. Use it as yer password aboard the WebDAV ship. No username be required, but if yer prompted, toss in whatever ye fancy (even 'soulfire').
webdav.addressDescription: Here’s the port ye need t’ reach yer files, matey! Sometimes it’s dav:// or davs:// instead o’ the usual seas (http(s)://).

api.title: API Gangway
api.description: SoulFire’s gRPC HTTP API lets ye parley with yer hulls through web-calls, arr!
api.securityWarning: Keep this here API Treasure Map secret, mate! Don’t be parlayin’ it. It’ll unlock the API fer ye.
api.addressDescription: Here’s the route ye need to use to plunder the API.

token.error: Couldn’t draw ye a map, mate!

access.howToConnect: How t’ parley with the fleet

mcLogsUpload.loading: Haulin’ to mclo.gs, set the sails...
mcLogsUpload.error: Storms! Log upload sunk to the briny mclo.gs!

avatar.title: Portrait o' thyself
avatar.description: Yer picture be based on yer pirate mail. Change your avatar yonder:

username.description: Yer tag’s used to name ye at the helm and in logs.

email.description: Yer mail be used fer settin' sail an' messages, arrr.

scriptName.min: Script monikers must have at least 3 runes, matey!
scriptName.max: Script monikers must have at most 32 runes, arrr!
scriptName.regex: Script names be all lowercase, start an' end with a letter or digit, dashes allowed between—no funny business!
scriptName.label: Moniker
scriptName.description: Name of the scroll yer scribblin’

elevatedPermissions.label: High Pirate Privileges
elevatedPermissions.description: Should this scroll be read with admiral’s eyes? Only top pirates can flip this.

addScriptDialog.title: Add new scroll to the chest
addScriptDialog.description: Scrolls be small code-parchments runnin’ on SoulFire. Use ‘em to do th’ dirty work or make the bots dance.

removeToast.error: Failed to make scripts walk the plank!

restartToast.success: Script be back from Davy Jones!

plugin.openWebsite: Chart a course to th' plugin website
